name: Karachi
description: Pakistan's largest city and economic hub with beautiful beaches, historic architecture, and vibrant food culture.

name: Lahore
description: Cultural capital of Pakistan with Mughal architecture, rich history, and famous food scene.

name: Islamabad
description: Modern capital city with beautiful landscapes, Margalla Hills, and planned architecture.

name: Hunza Valley
description: Breathtaking mountain valley with stunning landscapes, ancient forts, and friendly locals.

name: Skardu
description: Gateway to world's highest peaks including K2, with pristine lakes and dramatic mountain scenery.

name: Swat
description: Switzerland of Pakistan with lush green valleys, waterfalls, and Buddhist heritage sites.

name: Murree
description: Popular hill station near Islamabad with cool climate, pine forests, and colonial architecture.

name: Gilgit
description: Northern gateway city with access to three major mountain ranges and rich cultural diversity.

name: Neelum Valley
description: Paradise on earth with crystal clear rivers, lush forests, and snow-capped mountains.

name: Fairy Meadows
description: Spectacular alpine meadow offering close views of Nanga Parbat, perfect for camping and trekking.

name: Naran Kaghan
description: Stunning valley with pristine lakes, meadows, and the famous Lake Saif ul Mulook.

name: Chitral
description: Remote mountainous region known for Kalash culture, Hindu Kush range, and unique traditions.

name: Gwadar
description: Coastal city with pristine beaches, unique rock formations, and emerging port infrastructure.

name: Multan
description: City of saints and shrines with rich Sufi culture, ancient architecture, and handicrafts.

name: Bahawalpur
description: Desert city with magnificent palaces, Cholistan desert, and rich princely heritage.

name: Peshawar
description: Historic frontier city with Mughal and Buddhist heritage, famous for Pathan culture and cuisine.

name: Quetta
description: Fruit garden of Pakistan surrounded by mountains, known for dry fruits and tribal culture.

name: Rawalpindi
description: Twin city of Islamabad with bustling bazaars, military heritage, and gateway to northern areas.

name: Kalash Valleys
description: Unique indigenous culture in Chitral with ancient traditions, festivals, and mountain scenery.

name: Deosai National Park
description: High altitude plateau known as Land of Giants with wildflowers, brown bears, and pristine wilderness.
